name: Gothic Lattice Outdoor Sconce
description: Tall tapered wall sconce with matte black iron frame featuring interlocking oval lattice pattern and frosted glass panels. Crown-top finial. Suitable for indoor and outdoor use.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a front door or entry gate for a grand exterior statement. Also works in tall stairwells or double-height foyers indoors.

name: Amber Hurricane Scroll Sconce
description: Single-arm wall sconce with S-curve scrollwork in dark patina iron, holding a hammered amber glass hurricane shade. Ring mount at top.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a mirror or artwork. The amber glass casts a warm glow — ideal for hallways, bedrooms, or powder rooms. Small enough for narrow walls.

name: Outdoor Torch Hurricane Sconce
description: Torch-style outdoor wall sconce with elongated S-scroll arm and clear glass hurricane shade. Mounted on an exposed brick wall in a showroom setting.
placementNotes: Designed for outdoor use — terraces, porticos, garden walls. Use in pairs flanking a door. The elongated arm projects well from the wall to light pathways.

name: Brass Cylinder Vanity Light
description: Long horizontal wall light with three segments — matte black cylinders alternating with a central polished brass filigree band. Modern yet ornate.
placementNotes: Perfect above a bathroom vanity mirror or over a bar console. The horizontal orientation suits wide walls. Mount at eye level for best effect.

name: Baroque Amber Double Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with ornate acanthus leaf baroque backplate in antique brass, holding two upward-facing hammered amber glass hurricane shades.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a fireplace, large mirror, or painting. The double arms provide generous light spread. Matches well with brass chandelier collections.

name: Baroque Crystal Shade Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with heavily distressed bronze-gold scrollwork frame, crystal drop accents, and cream empire-style fabric shades with braided trim.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a large mirror or artwork above a console. The fabric shades soften the ornate frame. Works well with Heritage Shade chandeliers.

name: Brushed Brass Modern Torch
description: Minimalist single-arm wall sconce with rectangular brushed brass backplate and cylindrical torch-style light holder with knurled base detail. Clean, modern lines.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a bed headboard, bathroom mirror, or hallway artwork. The small footprint suits narrow walls. Clean lines pair with modern interiors.

name: Brass Ribbed Globe Sconce
description: Elegant wall sconce with polished brass arm extending from a gear-detailed round rosette, holding a ribbed clear glass globe shade. Tapered brass finial below.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a mirror or entryway. The ribbed glass creates beautiful light patterns on walls. The tapered finial adds a regal touch.

name: Pleated Bell Silver Sconce
description: Slim single-arm wall sconce with a distressed silver iron stem and pleated white bell-shaped fabric shade. Compact and understated.
placementNotes: Ideal for bedrooms flanking a headboard or in a narrow hallway. The small footprint and soft fabric shade keep things understated.

name: Ornate Brass Double Shade Sconce
description: Grand two-arm wall sconce with heavily ornate fluted brass body, acanthus leaf detailing, scrolled arms, and scalloped cream fabric shades with braided trim.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a large mirror, fireplace, or painting on a large wall. The grand scale matches Heritage Shade chandeliers perfectly.

name: Twisted Brass Drum Sconce
description: Tall wall sconce with a twisted ribbon brass body extending from an ornate rosette, topped with a cream drum shade. Very elongated vertical form.
placementNotes: The tall vertical form suits high walls — pair two flanking a double-height foyer mirror or stairwell artwork. The twisted brass ribbon is a sculptural feature.

name: Dragon Phoenix Double Sconce
description: Highly ornate two-arm wall sconce with mythical dragon/phoenix figures holding amber glass hurricane shades. Elaborate shell and acanthus backplate.
placementNotes: A showstopper — use in pairs flanking a grand mirror or fireplace. The dragon motifs suit homes with Indian or Asian-inspired decor. Statement piece.

name: Fluted Column Wall Light
description: Tall vertical wall light with frosted ribbed/fluted glass cylinder capped with polished brass endcaps. Glows evenly when lit. Art Deco inspired.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a bathroom vanity mirror, bar area, or hallway. The vertical column casts soft, even light. Stunning on dark walls.

name: Iron Torch Drum Sconce
description: Tall torch-style wall sconce with hammered iron body in dark patina, topped with a cream drum shade. Long tapered stem with bulbed finial end.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a large painting or mirror. The hammered texture pairs well with textured walls. Tall form suits high-ceiling spaces.

name: Scrollwork Drum Accent Sconce
description: Wide horizontal wall sconce with laser-cut brass scrollwork extending symmetrically on both sides of a central cream drum shade. A dramatic horizontal accent.
placementNotes: Best as a centrepiece on a feature wall — above a headboard, sofa, or dining console. The wide horizontal spread needs a generous wall. Use a single unit.

name: Scroll Crystal Glass Double Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with S-scroll brass arms, floral rosette centre, clear glass hurricane shades, and dangling crystal drop accents.
placementNotes: Pair with Crystal Garden or Crystal Fringe chandeliers. Use two flanking a mirror or fireplace. The crystal drops add sparkle in evening light.

name: Industrial Gear Sconce
description: Industrial-style wall sconce with a cluster of interlocking cog/gear wheels as the backplate, extending a single arm with a white bell shade and exposed filament bulb. Delhi Brass branded.
placementNotes: A conversation piece — perfect for a bar area, study, or industrial-themed space. Use a single unit or pair above a bar counter. The gears are sculptural even when unlit.

name: Coral Reef Sconce
description: Coastal-inspired wall sconce with a coral/branch motif backplate in verdigris-distressed finish, extending a curved arm with a pleated cream shade.
placementNotes: Perfect for coastal or nature-inspired rooms. Use in pairs flanking a bedroom mirror or in a powder room. The verdigris finish adds character.

name: Moroccan Diamond Torch Sconce
description: Wall sconce with diamond-shaped filigree backplate in verdigris/distressed finish, holding an amber glass hurricane shade on a straight arm.
placementNotes: Works indoors or outdoors. Pair two flanking a doorway or use in a Moroccan-themed room. The verdigris patina adds an aged, earthy feel.

name: Crystal Grid Wall Sconce
description: Rounded rectangular wall sconce with a grid of rectangular and square crystal prisms set in a gilt brass frame. Creates dramatic refracted light patterns.
placementNotes: A jewel-like accent. Use in pairs flanking a powder room mirror or a foyer console. The crystal grid casts prismatic patterns when lit.

name: Moon Globe Brass Sconce
description: Minimalist wall sconce with a curved antique brass gooseneck arm holding a frosted white moon-effect glass globe. Soft, diffused lunar glow. Delhi Brass branded.
placementNotes: Beautiful as a bedside reading light or in a hallway. The frosted moon globe creates a gentle ambient glow. Works solo or in pairs.

name: Lotus Leaf Double Bell Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with a rectangular lotus-engraved brass backplate, ring-loop arms, and upward-facing amber tulip glass shades.
placementNotes: Pair two flanking a puja area, console table, or large mirror. The lotus motif adds an Indian heritage touch while remaining versatile.

name: Brass Torchiere Shade Sconce
description: Tall single-arm wall sconce with polished brass turned stem and round rosette mount, topped with a small scalloped cream fabric shade.
placementNotes: A timeless classical sconce. Use in pairs flanking a mirror or in a series down a long hallway. Works with Heritage Shade chandeliers.

name: Geometric Circle Panel Sconce
description: Rectangular wall sconce with frosted glass panel overlaid with a brushed brass interlocking circles geometric pattern. Modern Art Deco aesthetic.
placementNotes: Clean and modern — perfect for contemporary corridors, powder rooms, or as a pair flanking a vanity mirror. The geometric pattern reads beautifully when backlit.

name: Distressed Scroll Frosted Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with elaborate distressed white-silver scrollwork and upward-facing frosted alabaster glass shades with lattice holders.
placementNotes: Matches the Distressed Scroll chandelier collection. Use in pairs to complement the Baroque or Shield chandeliers. Suits white or cream interiors.

name: Baroque Candelabra Sconce
description: Two-arm candelabra wall sconce with elaborate baroque scrollwork and floral repousse backplate. Exposed candle bulbs. Heavy cast brass.
placementNotes: A heritage statement. Use in pairs flanking a grand mirror or fireplace. No shade needed — the ornate brass is the feature. Matches ornate brass chandeliers.

name: Rustic Scroll Hurricane Sconce
description: Wall sconce with hammered iron scrollwork backplate in dark rustic patina and a clear glass cylinder hurricane shade. Exposed filament bulb creates warm glow.
placementNotes: Suited for rustic, industrial, or outdoor spaces. Pair two on a brick or stone wall flanking a doorway. The hammered texture adds character.

name: Noir Scroll Crystal Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with elaborate matte black iron scrollwork, leaf accents, exposed candle bulbs, and dangling crystal drops. Dark romantic aesthetic.
placementNotes: Pairs with the Noir Crystal chandelier collection. Use flanking a dark feature wall or mirror. The black iron and crystal contrast creates moody drama.

name: Crystal Prism Leaf Sconce
description: Wall sconce with acanthus leaf brass arms curving upward, supporting tiers of hanging crystal prism spears. Rectangular brass backplate.
placementNotes: Matches Prism Tier and crystal chandelier collections. The crystal spears catch light beautifully — use flanking a mirror for maximum sparkle.

name: Botanical Brass Hurricane Sconce
description: Single-arm wall sconce with botanical leaf-scroll brass arm extending from a round rosette, holding a clear glass hurricane shade. Warm brass patina.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking artwork or a mirror. The botanical brass detailing and clear glass create a warm, classic look suitable for most interiors.

name: Filigree Amber Double Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with intricate filigree scrollwork backplate in antique brass, holding two upward-facing amber hammered glass shades.
placementNotes: Pairs with Baroque Amber Double Sconce in style. Use flanking a mirror or painting. The filigree backplate is ornate enough to be a feature even unlit.

name: Hammered Brass Picture Light
description: Long tubular wall light in hammered antique brass, designed as a picture light or vanity light. Horizontal tube with brass end mounts.
placementNotes: Mount above a painting, mirror, or bookshelf for directed downlight. The hammered texture adds warmth. Also works as a vanity light.

name: Pagoda Outdoor Wall Lantern
description: Small pagoda-topped outdoor wall lantern with hammered dark iron body and frosted glass panels. Rustic, weathered character. Suitable for exterior walls.
placementNotes: Mount on exterior walls flanking a garden door or gate. The pagoda top and hammered finish suit farmhouse or colonial exteriors.

name: Empire Crystal Wall Lantern
description: Grand wall-mounted lantern with urn-shaped cut crystal body, ornate brass crown with eagle finial, ribbon bow swags, and a pointed base finial. French Empire style.
placementNotes: A showpiece wall lantern for grand interiors. Use flanking a double-height foyer mirror or stairwell. The cut crystal body glows beautifully when lit.

name: Outdoor Iron Torch Sconce
description: Outdoor wall sconce with diamond-pattern filigree iron backplate and spike lance bottom, holding an amber glass hurricane cup at top. Installed on an exterior textured wall.
placementNotes: Designed for exterior use. Mount flanking a main entrance or garden wall. The diamond backplate and torch form create a traditional Indian outdoor lighting look.

name: Iron Vine Burlap Sconce
description: Single-arm wall sconce with matte black iron scrollwork vine detailing on a square backplate. Burlap/linen conical shade. Plug-in cord option.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking a bed headboard or hallway artwork. The plug-in cord makes installation easy — no hardwiring needed.

name: Sunburst Double Shade Sconce
description: Dramatic wall sconce with a full sunburst/starburst backplate in antique brass with pointed rays. Two curved arms hold pleated white drum shades.
placementNotes: A show-stopping wall piece — use as a single focal point on a feature wall. The sunburst is sculptural even when unlit. Needs a wide, clear wall.

name: Birdcage Botanical Wall Sconce
description: Whimsical wall sconce shaped like a birdcage/globe with wire frame, decorative leaf and bird motifs, and an exposed bulb inside. Chain-hung from a wall rosette.
placementNotes: A charming accent for a garden room, bedroom, or covered terrace. The birdcage form is a conversation piece. Use solo or in an eclectic grouping.

name: Rope Twist Double Shade Sconce
description: Tall wall sconce with vertical dark bronze rod, twisted rope-pattern arms, and two pleated white fabric shades. Finial details top and bottom.
placementNotes: The tall vertical form suits panelled walls. Use in pairs flanking a mirror or fireplace. Works with Heritage Shade chandeliers.

name: Brass Leaf Glass Lantern Sconce
description: Wall-mounted lantern with ornate leaf-scroll brass frame, clear glass panels, and candle-style lights inside. Traditional heritage lantern form.
placementNotes: Use in pairs flanking an entry door or hallway mirror. The enclosed glass panels make it suitable for semi-outdoor covered areas too.

name: Ornate Torch Hurricane Sconce
description: Grand torch-style wall sconce with tapered brass body, ornate acanthus leaf shell backplate, and flared clear glass hurricane shade at top. Leaf finial at base.
placementNotes: A grand heritage torch. Use flanking a double-height foyer mirror or stairwell. The tapered form and acanthus detail suit classical interiors.

name: Scroll Rosette Double Shade Sconce
description: Two-arm wall sconce with ornate rosette backplate, acanthus scroll arms, and pleated white drum shades. Classic French-style proportions.
placementNotes: A classic pairing sconce. Use flanking a mirror, fireplace, or bed headboard. Matches Heritage Shade chandeliers.

name: Gothic Diamond Drum Sconce
description: Wall sconce with a Gothic diamond-shaped cutwork brass backplate, twin-arm bracket holding a cream linen drum shade with crystal prism accent between arms.
placementNotes: The diamond backplate doubles as a decorative wall accent. Use in pairs flanking artwork or in a hallway. The crystal accent catches light.

name: Brass Cylinder Picture Light
description: Minimalist vertical brass cylinder picture/accent light wall-mounted on a slim bracket. Brushed brass finish. Adjustable direction. Shown illuminating a Pichwai painting.
placementNotes: Mount beside artwork, mirrors, or shelving to provide directed accent light. The slim profile doesn't compete with the art. Works in pairs.

name: Wood Cylinder Picture Light
description: Minimalist vertical picture/accent light with a dark wood cylinder body and brass bracket mount. Warm directional downlight. Companion to the brass cylinder picture light.
placementNotes: Mount beside artwork or above a painting for directed accent light. The wood body adds warmth compared to the all-brass version. Works in pairs flanking a painting.
